reapack.name: reaper_reamix
reapack.desc: reamix.me: music-track retargeting via beat-aligned splicing

metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\deff0{\fonttbl{\f0 Calibri;}} \f0\fs28 reamix.me - Music-track retargeting for REAPER\line \fs22\line Pick any song, set a target length, and reamix produces a version at that length that sounds like a natural edit of the song - not a time-stretched version.\line \line The concept is Adobe Audition Remix, re-implemented as a native REAPER extension. The technique is beat-aligned splicing, not time-stretching: the algorithm finds pairs of beats where splicing from one to the other is perceptually inaudible (matched phase, chroma, energy, structural role) and stitches those splices into a path that hits the target duration.\line \line \b Three modes:\b0\line \bullet Target Duration - set a length, algorithm picks the optimal splice path\line \bullet Region Remix - retarget only the REAPER time-selection\line \bullet Block Assembly - manually order sections, algorithm optimizes the junctions\line \line \b Pipeline:\b0\line \bullet Neural beat detection (beat-this, ISMIR 2024)\line \bullet Structure segmentation (CBM, bar-level)\line \bullet 59-dim per-beat features (MFCC + chroma + spectral contrast)\line \bullet Transition cost matrix (10 perceptual signals + hard gates)\line \bullet Viterbi DP path optimization\line \bullet Multi-band crossfade rendering\line \line \b Requirements:\b0\line \bullet REAPER 6.0+\line \bullet Internet connection for first-time model download (~79 MB)\line \line \b Note:\b0 On first analysis, reamix.me downloads the beat-detection neural network to ~/.reamix/models/. This happens once.\line }

version.author: b451c
version.changelog:
reamix.me 1.0.0 - First OSS release
- Native REAPER extension (single .dylib / .dll / .so, no Python, no server, no installer) - Three remix modes: Target Duration, Region Remix, Block Assembly - Neural beat detection (beat-this ONNX, ISMIR 2024) - 10-component transition cost matrix tuned for perceptual inaudibility - Multi-band crossfade rendering (bass 200 ms, mid 100 ms, treble 40 ms, phase-aligned) - Live REAPER integration: time-selection polling, undo blocks, group tracking, save/reopen - Interactive waveform editor with splice markers, region overlay, playhead - Advanced cost-weight panel (8 raw weights + 4 Block Assembly tuning parameters) - Keyboard shortcuts: Space (preview), Esc (stop), Enter (insert) - Per-track persistence: cost weights, mode state, defaults survive REAPER restart - Model auto-downloads on first use (~79 MB)
